data.body:
Galen turned towards the Ambassador and extended his arms in a wide circle. “Would you care to dance?” he asked. 
The Ambassador extended her arms to accept. “I would like that very much. Play a song for me,” she said. 
They started slowly at first. They added a few turns and some flourishes.

5/14
data.author: did:plc:fkvdf5xwcvc6wes4wdunucmc

data.body:
“Yes. I’d like that very much,” Galen said. He held out his arms. A tear escaped from his eye. 
They danced together and apart. Moving closer to each other then away. Finally, they stopped and just stood there holding each other. 

10/14
